hooks.command: REPO="/Users/yonzekishigeki/Desktop/電子工作/iono-monitor-web"; [ "$(git -C "$REPO" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" = "$REPO" ] || exit 0; git -C "$REPO" pull --rebase 2>&1 | head -5

REPO="/Users/yonzekishigeki/Desktop/電子工作/iono-monitor-web"; [ "$(git -C "$REPO" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" = "$REPO" ] || exit 0; DEVLOG="$REPO/DEVLOG.md"; DATE=$(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"); LOG=$(git -C "$REPO" log --oneline -5); printf "
## %s — Auto-log
%s
" "$DATE" "$LOG" >> "$DEVLOG"
